---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature or enhancement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What is the user-facing problem you are trying to solve? Describe the situation where the current behavior is insufficient.

## Proposed solution

How you would like the feature to work. UI mockups or sketches welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why they did not fit.

## Additional context

Anything relevant — related Entra PIM features, Microsoft Graph endpoints, related issues.

---

Before opening a feature request, please check whether the topic is listed as out-of-scope in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) — areas like approval workflows, Azure Resource Roles, or bulk activation are tracked as backlog rather than as accepted contributions.
